title: zehneria grayana
intro: Zehneria grayana, also known as the Gray's creeper or Zehneria, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing skin irritations, among others. The herbal preparations of Zehneria grayana include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or using them as a topical application.
